See what your construction programme is really doing

Camentis integrates fragmented site data into consistent, near-real-time productivity intelligence

£61,600 Technology Investment Fund,
University of Cambridge
2× Winner Best Collaborative Project & Winner of Winners, Industrial Construction Awards 2026. Shortlisted: Digital Innovation.
25+ Projects validated across major UK contractors

What we do

Construction data exists on every project, but it sits in disconnected silos (planning tools, site diaries, delivery records, visual capture systems) with no integration layer connecting them. By the time a slowdown appears in the weekly report, the window to intervene has closed.

Camentis connects all of those streams into one consistent, standardised view of productivity. The platform is built with over five years of empirical research at the Laing O'Rourke Centre for Construction Engineering and Technology, University of Cambridge, and validated through pilot deployments with Tier 1 and Tier 2 UK contractors.

Open platform ↗

Our founders

Dr Ashan Asmone

Co-Founder/CEO

Research Associate, Laing O'Rourke Centre for Construction Engineering and Technology, University of Cambridge. 15+ years across construction delivery, facilities management, and built environment research.

LinkedIn ↗

Dr Danny Murguia

Co-Founder/CTO

Assistant Research Professor, Laing O'Rourke Centre for Construction Engineering and Technology, University of Cambridge. 20 years of construction engineering experience. Leads digital automation research at the LOR Centre.

Work with us

We are onboarding pilot partners for 2026–2027. If you are a contractor, developer, or infrastructure client and want to explore what consistent productivity measurement looks like on your project, get in touch.
